name: INVESCO MORTGAGE CAPITAL INC 7.5% Fixed-to-Floating Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock Liquation Preference $25.00 per Share
summary: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in residential and commercial mortgage-backed securities and other real estate-related assets. The company's objective is to provide attractive risk-adjusted returns to its investors. The company is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia.
